contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 240
- Description: Built the treasury-cache framework: a pre-computed JSON snapshot of all DAO off-chain inventory (items across every AGL ledger, warehouse managers, unit cost, unit weight) that replaces slow per-page-load GAS aggregations on the DApp with a single static fetch from raw.githubusercontent.com. Cache refreshes within minutes of any inventory write via fire-and-forget webhooks on 6 GAS projects; a 30-min safety-net cron bounds worst-case staleness. Cold-load time on 3 DApp pages (report_inventory_movement, report_dao_expenses, shipping_planner) dropped from several seconds of fanned-out GAS calls to a single static-file fetch. Artifacts: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache/blob/main/dao_offchain_treasury.json + SNAPSHOT.md. Shipped PRs: treasury-cache (repo init + publisher GAS + schema v1→v2): https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache/commits/main ; tokenomics#230 movement hook: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/230 ; tokenomics#233 notify hooks on 5 more write-paths: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/233 ; agroverse-inventory#4 repackaging notify: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agroverse-inventory/pull/4 ; dapp#166 report_inventory_movement cache swap: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/166 ; dapp#168 report_dao_expenses + shipping_planner swap + shared js/treasury_cache.js: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/168 . Companion doc updates: agentic_ai_context PROJECT_INDEX.md + WORKSPACE_CONTEXT.md §7 register the new treasury-cache repo.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 
- Attached Filename: None
- Destination Contribution File Location: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/treasury-cache
